full_text:
Huo Yi (Shaoxian) 霍弋 (紹先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huo Yi (霍弋), styledShaoxian (紹先), was born in Nan. Son of Huo Jun, was concerned about lack of defences at Chengdu. Huo Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
